indicators.name: Hard floor
indicators.rationale: The hard floor is not suitable for yoga and stretching as it can cause discomfort and injury.

indicators.name: No mats
indicators.rationale: There are no yoga mats present, which are essential for providing cushioning and preventing slips during yoga and stretching.

reasoning_summary: The space is not suitable for yoga and stretching due to the hard floor and lack of yoga mats.
